content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby - added case_sensitive param)
note: Finished. Added case_sensitive: bool = False param to both sync_do_groupby and do_groupby. Implementation: builds the attrgetter key with ignore_case postprocessing when case_sensitive is False (mirrors sort()'s behavior), sorts+groups by that key, then for the output remaps each group's grouper back to the un-postprocessed attribute value from the group's first item (so original case like 'CA' is preserved). All 837 existing tests pass. File is free for you to layer with_counts on top now - go ahead.
